text: Open Settings to configure the app, permissions and language.
Settings groups app-wide options: the permissions the app needs, the interface language, and analytics consent. Nothing here starts or stops the server.
Show a QR code so a nearby device can join and open your library.
The QR encodes the Wi-Fi network (or hotspot) plus the address of your library. Guests scan it to connect and browse — no typing required.
Share your library over the current Wi-Fi network.
When your phone is connected to Wi-Fi, other devices on the same network can open your library at your phone's address.
Turn on a hotspot so nearby devices can connect with no external network.
The hotspot creates a local Wi-Fi network from your phone. It works even with no SIM or internet — ideal for sharing offline.
Other devices can only reach your library while the server is running. The first start can take a few seconds.
Enable custom DNS settings for the server.
Only needed in special network setups; leave it off unless you know you need it.
Apply the DNS settings you entered.
Copy the whole log to the clipboard.
Choose Share to send your library or apps to another device.
Choose Receive to get content from another device.
Start the server so another device can pull your library.
Share the K2Go app itself with a nearby device.
Lets someone install K2Go from you without internet: they connect and download the app directly.
Scan a QR to connect to the other device.
Flip to the next set of gauges.
Show or hide the list of installed modules.
Turn anonymous usage analytics on or off.
When on, the app shares anonymous usage data to help improve it. No personal content is collected.
Pick the type of feedback you're sending.
Trigger a test crash — for diagnostics only.
Continue to the next setup step.
Allow notifications so the app can alert you about the server and transfers.
Allow storage access so the app can read and serve your library files.
Allow the app to display over other apps (needed for some on-screen help).
Let the app keep running in the background so the server stays up.
Open the system screen to manage all permissions at once.
Close the browser and return to the app.
Switch the QR between the Wi-Fi network and the hotspot.
Send the crash report to help us fix the problem.
Status of the PPK step in the install.
Install the Basic edition (smallest set of content).
Install the Full edition (largest set of content).
Also install companion data with the modules.
Launch the installation of the selected modules.
Back up your installed content and settings.
